message:
feat(history,cli,config): enhance diff output, CLI help styling, and config validation

Expand sync history with target path tracking, binary-aware diffing, and
file size metadata. History list and diff commands now show summary stats
(bytes changed, lines added/deleted) and target paths in both JSON and
table output. CLI help gets colored section headers, improved command
descriptions, and ANSI-styled version display. Config loading validates
keys on startup, warning on unknown entries and providing clearer error
messages for malformed files. Error module gains new variants and
structured error codes for config validation. Path resolution improved
for relative paths, symlinks, and cross-platform normalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
